findings.title: Path traversal in download endpoint
findings.description: filename parameter is joined to the static root without normalisation.
findings.patch:
--- a/src/handlers/download.js
+++ b/src/handlers/download.js
@@
- const p = path.join(root, req.query.filename)
+ const p = path.join(root, path.basename(req.query.filename))
findings.boundary: Reachable from the public /download HTTP handler.
findings.validation: Confirmed by retrieving /etc/passwd in a local checkout.
findings.prior_art: Mirrors CVE-2021-1234 in a sibling project.
findings.reach: Public entry point with attacker-controlled filename.
